clusters.justification: These terms co-activate within limbic and salience networks, reflecting the broad macro-level processing of emotional valence, arousal, and mood.
These terms correspond to striatal and orbitofrontal/ventromedial prefrontal circuitries dedicated to computing subjective value, guiding motivational drives, and resolving reward-based choices.
These terms map onto the default mode network's functional role in internally-directed representation, bridging self-referential processing, autobiographical memory retrieval, and social attribution.
